LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THIS CASE IS A COLLATERAL ATACK ON AN EARLIER JUDGMENT BASED ON AN ISSUE THAT COULD HAVE BEEN RAISED ON THAT PRIOR CASE AND NOT ON A NEW LAWSUIT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. Plaintiff' Louis Dillon'S Motion For Reconsideration
Off Calendar Jun-28-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Louis Dillon, Plaintiff and moving party in Pro Per
Warren Metlitzky, DCA, Office of the City Attorney, 415-554-3916, for defendant and opposing party

ARGUED and the Court rules as follows:
Plaintiff Louis Dillon's Motion For Reconsideration is Granted.
Defendant's Demurrer to plaintiff's complaint is sustained without leave to amend. Order signed in open court. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Court Reporter: Carol A. Karen, CSR # 8189(301/PJB)

MINI MINUTES:

PLAINTIFF LOUIS DILLON'S Motion For Reconsideration IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 28, 2011 TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE BUSCH THE JUDGE WHOSE ORDER PLAINTIFF MOVES TO RECONSIDER, AS JUDGE BUSCH WILL NOT BE SITTING IN DEPARTMENT 301 ON JUNE 27, THE DATE FOR WHICH PLAINTIFF HAS NOTICED THIS HEARING. Judge Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 (301/HEK)

NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THIS CASE IS A COLLATERAL ATACK ON AN EARLIER JUDGMENT BASED ON AN ISSUE THAT COULD HAVE BEEN RAISED ON THAT PRIOR CASE AND NOT ON A NEW LAWSUIT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J.
